headline: Cantor Fitzgerald Increases its Price Target on Teradyne, Inc. (TER)
summary: Teradyne, Inc. (NASDAQ:TER) is one of the Best Stocks To Buy. On June 29, Cantor Fitzgerald raised its price target on Teradyne, Inc. (NASDAQ:TER) to $550 from $400. The firm maintained an Overweight rating on the stock. In an investor note, the firm noted the AI infrastructure buildout represents a “generational semiconductor cycle” that remains […]

headline: Semiconductor Equipment Stocks Face a Pivotal Test as High Valuations Meet Unmatched Profitability
summary: Semiconductor equipment stocks like ASML, AMAT, LRCX, and TER face high valuations with P/E ratios above 60. Upcoming earnings will test if exceptional profitability and AI-driven demand justify the premium pricing.
